title: Implement Caching Layer with Redis
input_format: Cache operations: GET, SET, DELETE with keys and values, plus TTL configuration
output_format: Cached values, cache hit/miss indicators, and response times
constraints: Must support TTL-based expiration. Must handle cache stampede. Must support cache-aside pattern. Memory limit of 100MB for cache.
function_signature: class CacheService { get(key: string): Promise<any>; set(key: string, value: any, ttl?: number): Promise<void>; delete(key: string): Promise<void>; getOrSet(key: string, fetcher: () => Promise<any>, ttl?: number): Promise<any>; }
